_doc: Per-family row-count gate for the v20 CSE build pipeline. Per tmpl_gen/templates/05162026/v20_plan.txt §2.2. v20 forks v19 floors with bumps on the TI-actor and TI-other axes to track the per-template Count: 1500 -> 2500 bumps applied to JS.CSE.TI.{GRP.2, GRP.3, MAL.2, MAL.3, NEG.1}. The build halts before train/val split if any axis is below its reject_if_below value in the post-dedup corpus. shortname_patterns are exact matches OR prefix matches (trailing '*' = prefix match).

_provenance.rationale: v20 bumps five JS.CSE.TI.* template Counts from 1500 to 2500 in v20_cse.txt. The TI-actor axis declared total moves from 11,000 to 13,000 (+18%); the TI-other (CMP+NEG) axis moves from 4,000 to 5,000 (+25%). Floors are raised proportionally on those two axes; CSE-MAL axes carry v19 floors verbatim.

axes._note: v20 delta vs v19. JS.CSE.TI.GRP.{1,2,3} + JS.CSE.TI.MAL.{1,2,3} declared sum: GRP.1=2500 + GRP.2=2500 (v20 bump) + GRP.3=2500 (v20 bump) + MAL.1=2500 + MAL.2=2500 (v20 bump) + MAL.3=2500 (v20 bump) = 15000 (vs v19's 10000). Floor sized to ~50% of declared with per-actor cap 60 headroom; v17/v19 actual yield rate ~59% of declared so v20 expected ~8800.

v20 delta vs v19. JS.CSE.TI.CMP.1 declared 2500 (unchanged); JS.CSE.TI.NEG.1 declared 2500 (v20 bump from 1500). v19 actual ~2400; v20 expected ~3500 with the NEG.1 bump (negative-discrimination yield rate ~80% of declared).
Carried from v17.1 verbatim. JS.CSE.MAL.RPT.{1,2,3} declared sum: 5500 against the ~830 malware anchor pool. v17 actual: 5039.
Carried from v17.1 verbatim. JS.CSE.MAL.TAC.1 declared 1500; JS.CSE.MAL.TGT.1 declared 1500; JS.CSE.MAL.NEG.1 declared 1000. v17 actual: 3753.
